judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (crosshair reticle, dark object, redaction blocks, timestamp) but disagree on the number of redaction blocks (four corners vs. six symmetric blocks), which is a minor numerical inconsistency rather than a direct contradiction on a specific quoted text.
original_image_tags: Black-and-white infrared sensor still. The image features a central white crosshair reticle with a vertical scale and a horizontal scale marked with numbers 5, 10, and 15 on either side of the center. A small, dark, roughly rectangular or pill-shaped object is visible just above the horizontal axis and to the right of the vertical axis, between the 0 and 5 marks. The background is a grainy, uniform gray. The top edge of the image has a thick black bar. Multiple black redaction blocks are placed in all four corners of the image, obscuring potential overlay data. A timestamp in white text is visible in the lower-left corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Grainy monochrome instrument-style image with a central crosshair reticle and numbered tick marks, showing one small dark object near the upper center-right of the reticle and a timestamp “12/31/99 18:18:58” at bottom left.*
